name: tencent-dsgc
description: OctoBus package for Tencent Cloud Data Security Governance Center API 3.0 read-only operations.

Tencent_DSGC.TencentDsgcService/Describe.name: describe-asset-overview
Tencent_DSGC.TencentDsgcService/Describe.description: Query Tencent Cloud DSGC asset overview.

Tencent_DSGC.TencentDsgcService/ListDSPA.name: list-dspa-clusters
Tencent_DSGC.TencentDsgcService/ListDSPA.description: Query Tencent Cloud DSGC DSPA clusters.

Tencent_DSGC.TencentDsgcService/Describe.name: describe-dspa-cos-data-asset-buckets
Tencent_DSGC.TencentDsgcService/Describe.description: Query Tencent Cloud DSGC COS data asset buckets.

Tencent_DSGC.TencentDsgcService/Describe.name: describe-dspa-rdb-data-asset-by-compliance-id
Tencent_DSGC.TencentDsgcService/Describe.description: Query Tencent Cloud DSGC RDB data assets.

Tencent_DSGC.TencentDsgcService/Describe.name: describe-dspa-es-data-asset-by-compliance-id
Tencent_DSGC.TencentDsgcService/Describe.description: Query Tencent Cloud DSGC ES data assets.

Tencent_DSGC.TencentDsgcService/Describe.name: describe-dspa-assessment-latest-risk-list
Tencent_DSGC.TencentDsgcService/Describe.description: Query Tencent Cloud DSGC latest assessment risks.

Tencent_DSGC.TencentDsgcService/Describe.name: describe-dspa-assessment-tasks
Tencent_DSGC.TencentDsgcService/Describe.description: Query Tencent Cloud DSGC assessment tasks.

Tencent_DSGC.TencentDsgcService/Describe.name: describe-report-tasks
Tencent_DSGC.TencentDsgcService/Describe.description: Query Tencent Cloud DSGC report tasks.

Tencent_DSGC.TencentDsgcService/InvokeRe.name: invoke-read-only-action
Tencent_DSGC.TencentDsgcService/InvokeRe.description: Invoke an allowed Tencent Cloud DSGC Describe*, List*, or Get* action.
